title: MDA RESOURCE CENTER - 211info
text: MUSCULAR DYSTROPHY ASSOCIATION MDA RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides one-on-one support and information about muscular dystrophy, Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS), and related neuromuscular diseases, including clinical trials, care centers, programs, research and advocacy, summer camps, volunteer opportunities and community referrals. Eligibility: Must have a diagnosis of one of the 43 neuromuscular diseases covered. Includes Myasthenia Gravis, Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy (DMD), Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS), and Spinal Muscular Atrophy (SMA). Summer camps: Ages 8-17 Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-3pm Email (833) 275-6321 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (800) 572-1717 Main phone Main phone (833) 275-6321 Alternate (800) 572-1717 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information FEES: None for Resource Center services. MDA Care Centers accept most insurance. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Camps * Muscular Dystrophy General Health Education Programs * Muscular Dystrophy Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Muscular Dystrophy Muscular Dystrophy Clinics If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MUSCULAR DYSTROPHY ASSOCIATION
